nasb.text: For truly I say to you, until heaven and earth pass away, not the smallest letter or stroke shall pass from the Law until all is accomplished.

esv.text: For truly, I say to you, until heaven and earth pass away, not an iota, not a dot, will pass from the Law until all is accomplished.

cnv.text: 我實在告訴你們，就算天地過去，律法的一點一畫也不會廢去，全部都要成就。

ccb.text: 我实在告诉你们，就是到天地都消失了，律法的一点一划都不会废除，全都要成就。

csbs.text: 我确实地告诉你们：即使天和地都消逝了，律法的一点一画也绝不会消逝，直到一切都成就。
